name: 反轉型（毒酒非毒→身份重塑）
description: 觀眾以為女主要死，結果毒酒反應遲遲不來。緊接著皇帝揭曉真相——這是一場考驗，太子早已為她安排了新身份。從絕望到狂喜的情緒過山車讓觀眾獲得極致的情感體驗。

examples.drama_title: Girl Transmigrated as a Doomed Palace Maid...Modern Knowledge Turned Her Into the Prince’s Treasure
examples.excerpt: Why is this wine reacting so slowly? Why haven't I passed away yet? ... The Cortisan from Ronville is dead. She is now the daughter of Emory Niles, the Ministry of Revenue.
